prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别约为5597名、5408名、4881名、5055名、2445名。2021–2024年位次在4800–5600名区间窄幅波动，2025年位次大幅跃                        升至2445名，主要原因是珠海校区专业（原最低位次约4300–5600名）不再单独招生或并入北京校区统一录取，使校线最低位次显著前移；2025年基准位次约2445名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年142人、2022年148人、2023年153人、2024年154人、2025年161人，呈逐年小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划117人，较2025年减                        少44人，缩招约27%，属明显缩招，将加剧竞争，推动录取位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京师范大学是985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第13名、2                        022年第17名、2023年第19名、2024年第19名、2025年第19名、2026年第19名，稳居全国前20，属于顶尖师范类高校；2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，主                        要涉及学校管理类舆情（辟谣网络不实信息），无重大负面事件；抖音热度排名第37（较热），综合热度约127.7万，短视频曝光量处于中上水平，反映报考关注度较高；历史投                         档异常方面，2022年江西省曾出现位次大幅下降，但属外省个案，对本省影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，北京师范大学拥有A+学科6个（中国史、中国语言文学                         、地理学、心理学、教育学、马克思主义理论），A学科6个（体育学、外国语言文学、数学、环境科学与工程、生态学、统计学），A-学科7个（化学、哲学、法学、物理学、理                         论经济学、系统科学），A-及以上共18个，学科实力极强，对考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度2022年推荐、2023–2024年分化观望，整体平稳                        偏分化；心理学、中国语言文学等王牌专业持续高热；北京市2021–2026年高考考生总数分别为42037、44958、55201、55936、65434、84900人，持续大幅增长，2026年较2025年                         增长约30%，竞争压力显著加大；北京                        师范大学位于北京市，为本省高校，对本市考生具有天然的地域偏好优势；该校在本省招生占比历年较高（2021年142人、2025年161人），本地考生报考意愿强烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2445名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减27%、本省考生总数增长约30%、学校层次顶尖且声誉良好等因素，竞争加剧推动位次前移。，结合考生大增和学校热度做小幅修正，预测2026年最低录取位次约1994名，区间1767–2221名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1994名，区间1767–2221名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1767名）可重点冲击一档的励耘实验班和双学士学位                         项目；位次接近区间上限（>2221名）建议以三档专业为主，谨慎选择一档专业。北京师范大学学科实力极强，A+学科众多，建议结合个人兴趣和学科评估等级综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were approximately 5597, 5408, 4881, 5055, and 2445 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 4800 and 5600 from 2021 to 2024, but jumped significantly to 2445 in 2025, mainly because majors at the Zhuhai campus (originally ranked around 4300–5600) were no longer separately enrolled or merged into the Beijing campus for unified admission, causing the minimum ranking to move forward notably; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2445. The university's comprehensive enrollment plan in Beijing: 142 in 2021, 148 in 2022, 153 in 2023, 154 in 2024, and 161 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 117, a decrease of 44 from 2025, a reduction of about 27%, which is a significant contraction that will intensify competition and push admission rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Normal University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 13th in 2021, 17th in 2022, 19th in 2023, 19th in 2024, 19th in 2025, and 19th in 2026, consistently among the top 20 nationally, making it a top-tier normal university; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management public opinion (refuting online misinformation), with no major negative events; Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.277 million, short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting relatively high application attention; regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a significant ranking drop in Jiangxi Province in 2022, but this was an out-of-province case with limited impact on this province; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Beijing Normal University has 6 A+ disciplines (Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Geography, Psychology, Education, Marxist Theory), 6 A disciplines (Physical Education, Foreign Language and Literature, Mathematics, Environmental Science and Engineering, Ecology, Statistics), and 7 A- disciplines (Chemistry, Philosophy, Law, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Systems Science), with a total of 18 A- and above, indicating extremely strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher/education majors was recommended in 2022, with differentiation and wait-and-see in 2023–2024, overall stable but differentiated; psychology, Chinese language and literature, and other flagship majors remain highly popular; the total number of college entrance examination candidates in Beijing from 2021 to 2026 is 42037, 44958, 55201, 55936, 65434, and 84900 respectively, showing continuous significant growth, with a 30% increase from 2025 to 2026, significantly increasing competitive pressure; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, a provincial university, giving it a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates; its enrollment proportion in this province has been relatively high over the years (142 in 2021, 161 in 2025), with strong willingness among local candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2445, a significant 27% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, a 30% increase in the number of local candidates, and the university's top-tier level and good reputation, intensified competition will push rankings forward. With minor adjustments based on the surge in candidates and university popularity, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 1994, with a range of 1767–2221.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1994, range 1767–2221. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main force, Tier 1 for sprinting, and Tier 3 for safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1767), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Li Yun Experimental Class and dual bachelor's degree programs; if ranking is close to the upper limit (>2221), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and be cautious with Tier 1 majors. Beijing Normal University has extremely strong disciplinary strength with many A+ disciplines, so it is recommended to combine personal interests and discipline evaluation levels for comprehensive selection.
